name: Pumpkin Pie Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the pumpkin, evaporated milk, eggs, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt, ginger, and cloves. Mix until well blended.
2. Pour the mixture into an ungreased 9 x 13 pan.
3. Sprinkle the yellow cake mix over the pumpkin mixture.
4. Sprinkle the chopped walnuts over the cake mix.
5. Drizzle one cup of melted butter over the top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
